name: Enigma
description: Chaos hunts the spark of endless suns, whose light will die in my crushing grasp.

abilities.name: Event Horizon
abilities.description: The higher Enigma's level, the greater the applied movement speed slow. Radius: 600 (700). Move Speed Slow: 4%. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Facing Timer: 0.5. Move Speed Slow Increase: 1%.

abilities.name: Malefice
abilities.description: Focus his will on an enemy unit, damaging it and repeatedly stuns it. Strange gravities pull at the core of those who would oppose you, holding them in place. Cast Range: 450/500/550/600. Number of Instances: 3 (7). Instance Interval: 2. Damage per Instance: 55/70/85/100 (155/170/185/200). Stun Duration per Instance: 0.3/0.5/0.7/0.9 (0.6/0.8/1/1.2). Malefice Duration: 4 (12). Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Demonic Summoning
abilities.description: Summons fragments of the Enigma himself. Grants the summoned Eidolons max health bonus corresponding to Enigma's current health. Cast Range: 400. Number of Eidolons: 3 (7). Duration: 40. Current Health as Max Health Bonus: 3%. Attacks to Multiply: 7. Set Current Health: 100%. Cooldown: 40/38/36/34. Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Midnight Pulse
abilities.description: Steeps an area in dark resonance, damaging enemy units based on their current health. Cast Range: 700. Effect Radius: 600 (800). Damage per Second: 5/10/15/20. Current Health as Damage per Second: 4%/6%/8%/10%. Duration: 9/10/11/12. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Cooldown: 40/35/30/25. Mana Cost: 65/90/115/140.

abilities.name: Black Hole
abilities.description: The ground trembles as Enigma channels his ultimate vortex of destruction, a singularity with the power to end worlds. Cast Range: 275. Max Channel Time: 4. Inner Effect Radius: 420. Inner Pull Speed: 30. Damage per Second: 100/150/200 (150/200/250). Max Silence Duration: 4. Cooldown: 180/170/160. Mana Cost: 300/400/500.
